distinct_engineering_value: local original content asset type cards
asset continuity and production checkpoint contracts
dedup_decision.story_flicks_boundary: story-flicks remains the next Section 5 item for AIGC video pipeline schema; Jellyfish only covers content asset and storyboard metadata.

local_contract_evidence.cli_build_command: python -m heitang_kb_forge.cli build-content-asset-schema-library --output artifacts/audits/section_5/jellyfish_content_asset_schema/content_asset_schema --library-name "HeiTang Content Asset Schema Library"

why_reference_only: A local original Content Asset Schema reference is implemented and validated.
The run produced non-empty asset cards, storyboard metadata schema, workflow templates, an index, a report, and a validation report.
The capability adds product value to Template Library, Artifact Management, and Document Generation planning without copying or executing the external project.
No Jellyfish runtime is installed or executed, so the correct decision is reference_only rather than real_integration.
boundaries: reference_only means local schema/reference evidence only.
No Jellyfish runtime, code, prompt files, SKILL.md files, scripts, or repository contents are bundled.
No short-drama workbench runtime, video generation runtime, asset rendering runtime, media upload/download, crawler, or account operation is implemented.
UI may show Template Library / Artifact Management preview status only; full UI workflow remains a later campaign.
remaining_gap: Section 5 items 5.10 through 5.14, strengthening items 5.S1-5.S3, Campaign 3 final consistency gate, external Skill learning E2E, owned Skill generation, multi-agent workflow, full UI workflow, Core Bridge, configuration, Full Gate, EXE, and release remain incomplete.
